title: Armature E5 — Polish, UX Hardening & User-Facing Docs

issues.title: E5: Polish, UX Hardening & User-Facing Docs
issues.dod: All four stories complete; make check green; arm tui renders; forensics commands work; docs site complete
notes: Four independent stories: S1 UX hardening, S2 interactive TUI board, S3 time-travel forensics, S4 user-facing docs
Tech stack: Go 1.26, Cobra, BubbleTea 1.3.4, Lip Gloss 1.1.0, Glamour 0.8.0, Bubbles 0.20.0 — no new dependencies
Run make check before starting any story and again before each commit

issues.title: UX Hardening — fix four dogfooding regressions plus schema and list discoverability
issues.scope: internal/ops/types.go, internal/ready/stale.go, cmd/trellis/ready.go, cmd/trellis/claim.go, cmd/trellis/assign.go, cmd/trellis/decompose.go, cmd/trellis/list.go, cmd/trellis/main.go, cmd/trellis/main_test.go, cmd/trellis/cmd_extra_test.go
issues.dod: L6, L9, L10, L11, L12, L13 all remediated; make check green
notes: Fixes: open transition target (L11), stale-claim diagnostic (L6), story-claim auto-advance (L9), unassign claim release (L10)
Adds: decompose-apply --example flag (L12), arm list command with --type/--parent filters (L13)

issues.title: Add `open` as valid transition target (L11)
issues.dod: TestTransitionToOpen and TestTransitionToOpenRejectsInvalidAlias pass; make check green
notes: Add StatusOpen to ValidTransitionTargets in internal/ops/types.go
Commit: fix(ux): add open as valid transition target (L11)

issues.title: Stale-claim diagnostic in `arm ready` (L6)
issues.dod: StaleClaims() unit tests pass; ready prints stale diagnostic to stderr when queue empty; make check green
notes: New StaleClaims() helper in internal/ready/stale.go
Diagnostic: 'Warning: stale claim(s) may be blocking the queue' with steal instructions
Commit: fix(ux): print stale-claim diagnostic when ready queue is empty (L6)

issues.title: Auto-advance story/epic to `in-progress` when child task claimed (L9)
issues.dod: Claiming a task auto-transitions its story/epic parent to in-progress; integration test passes; make check green
notes: After claiming, walk up parent chain and emit transition → in-progress for any open/claimed story or epic
Commit: fix(ux): auto-advance story/epic to in-progress after claiming child task (L9)

issues.title: Fix `arm unassign` to release `claimed` status back to `open` (L10)
issues.dod: unassign on a claimed issue emits transition → open; child tasks become unblocked; make check green
notes: In newUnassignCmd: if issue status is claimed, also emit transition → open op
Commit: fix(ux): unassign releases claimed status back to open (L10)

issues.title: `decompose-apply --example` flag for schema discoverability (L12)
issues.dod: arm decompose-apply --example prints valid minimal plan JSON; TestDecomposeApplyExampleFlag passes; make check green
notes: When --example set: print embedded example JSON and return nil; --plan not required
Commit: feat(ux): add decompose-apply --example flag for schema discoverability (L12)

issues.title: `arm list` command with `--type` and `--parent` filters (L13)
issues.dod: arm list shows all issues; --type and --parent filter correctly; --format json outputs structured data; tests pass; make check green
notes: Human format: ID\tTYPE\tSTATUS\tTITLE tab-separated
JSON/agent format: array of {id, title, type, status, parent, blocked_by}
Commit: feat(ux): add arm list command with --type and --parent filters (L13)

issues.title: `arm tui` Interactive Board — BubbleTea kanban with three status columns
issues.dod: arm tui renders open/active/done columns; keyboard nav works; auto-refresh; q quits; make check green
notes: Read-only in this iteration — no write operations from TUI
Tech: BubbleTea 1.3.4, Lip Gloss 1.1.0, Bubbles 0.20.0 — no new deps

issues.title: Board model — column layout and keyboard navigation
issues.dod: BubbleTea model with open/active/done columns; h/l or arrow key nav between columns; j/k nav within column; enter opens detail viewport; unit tests pass
notes: Three columns: Open, Active (in-progress+claimed), Done (done+merged+cancelled)
Workers panel below columns
Commit: feat(tui): add board model with column layout and keyboard nav (E5-S2-T1)

issues.title: `arm tui` CLI command with auto-refresh
issues.dod: arm tui launches board; auto-refreshes every 5s; q quits cleanly; make check green
notes: Wire board model into Cobra command; tick message drives refresh
Commit: feat(tui): add arm tui interactive board command (E5-S2)

issues.title: Time Travel & Forensics — reconstruct issue context at any historical commit
issues.scope: internal/git/git.go, internal/git/git_test.go, internal/materialize/atsha.go, internal/materialize/atsha_test.go, cmd/trellis/render_context.go, cmd/trellis/context_history.go, cmd/trellis/main.go
issues.dod: render-context --at <sha> and context-history commands work; make check green
notes: Reads git object store directly — no new external dependencies
Adds ListFilesAtCommit, ShowFileAtCommit, LogBranch to git.Client interface

issues.title: Git client forensics methods — ListFilesAtCommit, ShowFileAtCommit, LogBranch
issues.dod: ListFilesAtCommit, ShowFileAtCommit, LogBranch implemented on git.Client; tests pass against real git repo
notes: Uses git cat-file and git log — no new dependencies
Commit: feat(git): add ListFilesAtCommit, ShowFileAtCommit, LogBranch (E5-S3-T1)

issues.title: `MaterializeAtSHA` — replay op log at arbitrary historical commit
issues.dod: MaterializeAtSHA(sha) returns materialized state as of that commit; unit tests pass with real git fixtures
notes: Lists op files at SHA via ListFilesAtCommit, reads each via ShowFileAtCommit, replays
Commit: feat(materialize): add MaterializeAtSHA for forensic context reconstruction (E5-S3-T2)

issues.title: `render-context --at <sha>` flag for time-travel context
issues.dod: render-context --issue ID --at <sha> returns context as of that SHA; output differs from HEAD on a repo with history; make check green
notes: Add --at flag to existing render-context command; if absent, behavior unchanged
Commit: feat(forensics): add render-context --at <sha> for time-travel context (E5-S3-T3)

issues.title: `arm context-history` — list issue context at each commit
issues.dod: context-history --issue ID lists each commit SHA where issue context changed with timestamp; make check green
notes: Uses LogBranch to walk history, calls MaterializeAtSHA at each commit
Commit: feat(forensics): add context-history command (E5-S3-T4)

commands.md must include new E5 commands: arm tui, context-history, list, and decompose-apply --example

issues.title: `README.md` — project overview, install, and 5-minute quickstart

notes: Sections: Why Armature, Install, 5-Minute Quickstart, Documentation index, Key Concepts, License

issues.title: `docs/getting-started.md` — step-by-step guide from install to first agent task

notes: Sections: Prerequisites, init, worker-init, create, work loop, decompose from PRD, monitoring, team setup

issues.title: `docs/commands.md` — complete command reference for every `arm` subcommand
issues.dod: Every arm subcommand documented with synopsis, flags, examples, and notes; includes all E5 additions (tui, context-history, list, decompose-apply --example)
notes: Addresses L12 documentation gap for decompose-apply plan format
Commit: docs: add complete command reference (E5-S4-T3)

issues.title: `docs/use-cases.md` — per-persona workflow walkthroughs
